Ἐλισαιέ, ὁ indecl. (3 Km 19:16f, 19; 4 Km 2–8; Sir 48:12) 1 Cl 17:1, and

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1
